{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/135195424?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/CE2Sec/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/CE2Sec/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/CE2Sec/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/CE2Sec/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/CE2Sec", "id": 135195424, "login": "CE2Sec", "node_id": "U_kgDOCA7rIA", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/CE2Sec/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/CE2Sec/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/CE2Sec/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/CE2Sec/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/CE2Sec/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/CE2Sec", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-28685", "cvss": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-285", "name": "Improper Authorization"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-862", "name": "Missing Authorization"}], "description": "## Summary

`GET /api/invoices/{id}` only checks the role-based `view_invoice` permission but does not verify the requesting user has `access` to the invoice's customer. Any user with `ROLE_TEAMLEAD` (which grants `view_invoice`) can read all invoices in the system, including those belonging to customers assigned to other teams.

## Affected Code

`src/API/InvoiceController.php` line 92-101:

```php
#[IsGranted('view_invoice')]           // Role check only, no customer access check
#[Route(methods: ['GET'], path: '/{id}', name: 'get_invoice', requirements: ['id' => '\d+'])]
public function getAction(Invoice $invoice): Response
{
    $view = new View($invoice, 200);
    $view->getContext()->setGroups(self::GROUPS_ENTITY);
    return $this->viewHandler->handle($view);  // Returns ANY invoice by ID
}
```

The web controller (`src/Controller/InvoiceController.php` line 304-307) correctly checks customer access:

```php
#[IsGranted('view_invoice')]
#[IsGranted(new Expression("is_granted('access', subject.getCustomer())"), 'invoice')]
public function downloadAction(Invoice $invoice, ...): Response { ... }
```

The `access` attribute in `CustomerVoter` (line 71-87) verifies team membership, but this check is entirely missing from the API endpoint.

## PoC

Tested against Kimai v2.50.0 (Docker: `kimai/kimai2:apache`).

Setup:
- TeamA with CustomerA ("SecretCorp"), TeamB with CustomerB ("BobCorp")
- Bob is a teamlead in TeamB only
- An invoice exists for SecretCorp (TeamA)

```bash
# Bob (TeamB) reads SecretCorp (TeamA) invoice
curl -H "Authorization: Bearer BOB_TOKEN" http://localhost:8888/api/invoices/1
```

Response (200 OK):
```json
{
  "invoiceNumber": "INV-2026-001",
  "total": 15000.0,
  "currency": "USD",
  "customer": {"name": "SecretCorp", ...}
}
```

Bob can also enumerate all invoices via `GET /api/invoices` — the list endpoint uses `setCurrentUser()` in the query but the single-item endpoint bypasses this entirely via Symfony ParamConverter.

## Impact

Any teamlead can read all invoices across the system regardless of team assignment. Invoice data typically contains sensitive financial information (amounts, customer details, payment terms). In multi-team deployments this breaks the intended data isolation between teams.

## Suggested Fix

Add the customer access check to the API endpoint, matching the web controller:

```diff
 #[IsGranted('view_invoice')]
+#[IsGranted(new Expression("is_granted('access', subject.getCustomer())"), 'invoice')]
 #[Route(methods: ['GET'], path: '/{id}', name: 'get_invoice')]
 public function getAction(Invoice $invoice): Response
```", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00399, "percentile": 0.31604}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-v33r-r6h2-8wr7", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-03-04T20:43:17Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-v33r-r6h2-8wr7", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-v33r-r6h2-8wr7"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-28685"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-03-06T05:16:38Z", "published_at": "2026-03-04T20:43:17Z", "references": ["https://github.com/kimai/kimai/security/advisories/GHSA-v33r-r6h2-8wr7", "https://github.com/kimai/kimai/commit/a0601c8cb28fed1cca19051a8272425069ab758f", "https://github.com/kimai/kimai/releases/tag/2.51.0", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-28685", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-v33r-r6h2-8wr7"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/kimai/kimai/security-advisories/GHSA-v33r-r6h2-8wr7", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/kimai/kimai", "summary": "Kimai's API invoice endpoint missing customer-level access control (IDOR)", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-11T05:37:54Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-v33r-r6h2-8wr7", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.51.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "kimai/kimai"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2.50.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Kimai's API invoice endpoint missing customer-level access control (IDOR)
